message:
chore: Remove target-sagebeacon/ build artifacts from tracking

Remove alternate target directory (2127 files) from version control.
Build artifacts should never have been committed. The existing
target-sagebeacon/ gitignore pattern prevents re-adding.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
